title: Fard
content:
Love brings the tiny sweat into your hair
    Like stars marching in the dead of night.

    From the Hindustani of Mir Taqui (eighteenth century).
meaning:
Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator)'s contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Fard"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
